titleStmt.title: SII 27.198: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 198. (A.R. No. 292 of 1931-32.) YEḌATĀḌI, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab standing in the field of Subbaka-seṭṭiti.

This registers a gift of land to a maṭha and the deity Umāmahēśvara installed therein by Baṁchaṇṇa Heggaḍe alias Kōṭa Ādi of Yedatāḍi, when Sadāśivanāyaka of Keḷadi was governing Bārakūrurājya. Dēśikaṇa-hebbāra was appointed to stay in the maṭha and look after the endowments.

The record is dated Śaka 1487, Raktākshi, Phālguṇa ba. 14, Monday, Śīvarātri. The details of date given are wrong. The tithi corresponds to 1565 A.D., March 1 when the weekday was Thursday. The Śivarātri occurred on Māgha ba. 14 which tithi fell on Wednesday, January 31 of that year. The Śaka year was current.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . nirvighna (na)mastu namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē . trayilōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁ
bhāya śaṁbhavē . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhanaśakavaruṣa 1487 raktakṣi saṁvacarada phālguṇa bahuḷa 14 sōmavāra
śivarātre puṁṇyakāladallū śrīmadrājādhiraja rājaparamēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa sadāśivarāya mahārāyaru vijeyanagariya
siṁhāsanadalli kuḷitu sakala vaṁrna dharṁmāśramaṁgaḷa pratipālisutiha kāladalli Avara nirūpadiṁda keḷadiya sadāśivanāya
karu bārakūra rājyava pratipālisuva kāladalli māḍida dharmaśāsanada vivara yeḍatāḍiya jāḷeyaka baḷiya baṁ ṇa
hegaḍeyarāda koṭa Ādiyarū kaṭṭida maṭayirusida Umāmahēsvara dēvarige biṭabāḷa catusīmēya vivara mū
ḍalu māyinagade gaḍi Aribaḷiyavaragaḍi bemmaṇa meraṭana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu jauḷikēri halara
gaḍi koḷakegade gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu beḷūra gadegaḍi sālindaṁ mūḍalu hariva tōḍiṁ
daṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catusīmeyoḷaguḷa maṭhadastaḷa saha bayalu nāgaṁḍu gadalu gade mu 12 gēṇi Akki
mu 36 kereca Umāmahēśvara dēvara nayivēdyakke Akki mu 18 naṁdādīptige Akkimu 4¢ marana horasuvada
ke Akkimu 1¢ Anttu 24 sarva ge Asāḍi habbakke mu kruṣṇaṣṭamige mu ¢ sāṇecauti hōmakke mu
rmake mu tahā navamige mu divāḷihabbakke mu kārtrimāsa toḷasi pājege mu ṣirāmadi pūjege mu
śivarātrige mu ¢ yugādige mu . vāyiśākha huṁṇamege mu 1 Amāse dadeśige mu 1 yi bāḷige kaṭṭuteru baṁ
caṇahegaḍeyarige kālakālake Akimu ¢ dēvarige Adāya mu 2¢ Aṁtu mu 36 kaṁdāvara dēśikaṇa hebbārarū
yi maṭhadalidu bāḷabadu yivaru yiva naḍasutaṁma saṁtānapāraṁ pariyali bāḷuvaru yi dharmake
gaṇa yibbaru hegaḍeyakkaḷavappu Avarige cautti daa Anāḍi habbada kke yi pra
sādavakoṭṭu baharu yidharmake Āru Aḷupidavaru varaṇāśiyali sāvira kavileya koṁda pātakake hōharu
dāna pālanayōrmadhyē dānāśrēyōnrupālanaṁ dānāsvarggaṁ mavāpnōti pālanādacutaṁpadaṁ śrī
baṁcaṇa hegaḍeyaru yidara teru beḍige Anāyavanu kādu koḍuvarū śrī
Digital edition of SII 27.198 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
